programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple battles over price versus luxury in Tampa.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: After a health scare, a Pennsylvania couple looks for a vacation home to make family memories in the Pocono Mountains.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David Bromstad helps a young couple find a home with old-fashioned charm in Worcester, MA.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen take on a fire-damaged home, but they realise the only way to fix it is to demolish the house and start from scratch.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: With a budget over $1 million, Alison takes on her biggest renovation yet with an Amalfi meets Palm Springs inspired theme.

programme.title: Celebrity Iou
programme.desc: Drew and Jonathan Scott help Hollywood A-listers express gratitude to people who have impacted their lives with surprise home renovations.

programme.title: Building Roots
programme.desc: Ben and Cristi take on the senseless flow of a Nashville couple's house and bring the property's stunning river views into the home's interior.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: After recovering from a serious illness, a couple looks for an oceanfront home on Oak Island, North Carolina.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: A home in Whittier, California is renovated on a short schedule for a quick profit.

programme.title: Good Bones
programme.desc: Mina and Karen return to Talbott Street for their largest project on the block!

programme.title: Celebrity Iou
programme.desc: Zoe Saldana calls on Jonathan and Drew to thank her best friend of 15 years with a family home refresh.

programme.title: Sin City Rehab
programme.desc: The pressure's on to deliver as Alison's biggest reno in Vegas comes to fruition. Plus, she gets an offer to be on the cover of a local magazine.

programme.desc: After recovering from a serious illness, a couple looks for an oceanfront home on Oak Island, North Carolina.

programme.desc: A home in Whittier, California is renovated on a short schedule for a quick profit.

programme.desc: Young newlyweds uproot from Bangkok to pursue her dream job in Hanoi, Vietnam.

programme.desc: A woman looks to spend her $1 million lottery winnings on a family dream home in Western MA.

programme.desc: Mina and Karen return to Talbott Street for their largest project on the block!

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: A couple is using an inheritance to trade their starter home on a traffic-heavy street for a safer, quieter spot for their two young children.

programme.title: 100 Day Dream Home
programme.desc: A family who has spent a year crammed into Grandma's house is expecting baby number seven, and they need help building their perfect farmhouse.

programme.desc: Ben and Cristi take on the senseless flow of a Nashville couple's house and bring the property's stunning river views into the home's interior.

programme.desc: A home in Whittier, California is renovated on a short schedule for a quick profit.

programme.desc: A teacher wants to upgrade to a bigger house with space for her children and growing baking business.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A teacher and his sports reporter wife hunt for a home in the countryside of Surrey, England.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple is looking for a home in a kid-friendly neighbourhood in Tampa.

programme.title: Renovation Face-Off
programme.desc: It's Fix My Flip vs. Help! I Wrecked My House as Jasmine Roth and Page Turner go head-to-head to see who has the best ambitious addition.

programme.title: Two Steps Home
programme.desc: While working with two new parents, Mary pulls out her design tricks to set their home apart from the competition.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on a client who could help make or break their design business. They transform a living area into an open concept kitchen.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: David helps a mother and her daughter reunite to find a home in honour of their late son and brother in Ojai, California.

programme.title: Ugliest House In America
programme.desc: A house where art has taken over the walls, a former church with a terrifying hole and a once-glamorous home compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: The guys take on a desolate duplex and transform it into a dream home. Keith sees this as an opportunity to create a chic, English countryside escape.

programme.title: House Hunters: Amazing Water Homes
programme.desc: After recovering from a serious illness, a couple looks for an oceanfront home on Oak Island, North Carolina.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: A home in Whittier, California is renovated on a short schedule for a quick profit.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A Cambridge student seeks modern comforts while living the old English lifestyle with his wife.

programme.desc: Staten Islanders looking for their first home in New Jersey have interesting wish lists.

programme.desc: It's Fix My Flip vs. Help! I Wrecked My House as Jasmine Roth and Page Turner go head-to-head to see who has the best ambitious addition.

programme.title: Bargain Block
programme.desc: Keith and Evan buy a home littered with debris and branches. However, Keith finds a few treasures that inspire him to create a forest-chic design.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A newlywed couple faces cultural and style differences as they search for their first home together in Maryland.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are offered the chance to split a flip, but it is difficult to work with competitors.

programme.title: Down Home Fab
programme.desc: Chelsea and Cole take on tall dentists who aren't afraid to go bold. They push the boundaries with a modern-industrial kitchen and living room.

programme.title: Renovation Face-Off
programme.desc: It's Help! I Wrecked My House vs. Fix My Flip as Page Turner and Jasmine Roth go head-to-head in the competition for the best creative open concept.

programme.title: My Lottery Dream Home
programme.desc: With one of the biggest budgets ever, David helps former housekeepers find a $5 million luxury vacation home in Costa Rica.

programme.title: Ugliest House In America
programme.desc: A large wannabe castle, an extravagant house with no privacy and a round home stuck in the past compete for a $150,000 makeover.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are offered the chance to split a flip, but it is difficult to work with competitors.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are offered the chance to split a flip, but it is difficult to work with competitors.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A single mother with an empty nest wants to return to Grand Bahama Island and start a business.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A couple disagrees over whether they want a grand or cozy vacation home in Destin, Florida.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: Hilton and Fiona want to turn their historic Baltimore fixer-upper into a home where they can put down family roots and more than 200 plant roots.

programme.title: First Time Fixer
programme.desc: Despite being new to home renovation, Hilary and David are taking on a complete interior renovation of their newly purchased Waco fixer.

programme.title: Married To Real Estate
programme.desc: A bachelor is looking for a forever home that fits his lifestyle. Egypt and Mike turn a mid-century tear-down into a work of art with a total revamp.

programme.title: Celebrity Iou
programme.desc: Jeremy Renner is moving his mum to Los Angeles to be closer to her family.

programme.title: Married To Real Estate
programme.desc: After a fire destroys actress and comedian Cocoa Brown's home. She and her son look to Egypt and Mike to either restore or build their dream home.

programme.title: Renovation Aloha
programme.desc: Kamohai and Tristyn purchase an abandoned house in Pearl City with rotting floors and work tirelessly on a stunning renovation to honour its legacy.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A newlywed couple faces cultural and style differences as they search for their first home together in Maryland.

programme.title: Flip Or Flop
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina are offered the chance to split a flip, but it is difficult to work with competitors.

programme.title: House Hunters International
programme.desc: A family must decide between city life and suburban living after a job transfer to Antwerp, Belgium.

programme.title: House Hunters
programme.desc: A Boston couple looks for a home with plenty of land for their six alpacas.

programme.desc: After ending a long-term relationship, a buyer looks for a grand and luxurious home in Atlanta.
